---
title: "Yafei Zhang"
description: "Yafei (Judie) Zhang — Data-driven business and marketing strategist specializing in customer analytics, predictive modeling, and marketing strategy."
image: "IMG_8940.jpg"
open-graph:
  image: "IMG_8940.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: yaz133@ucsd.edu
      href: mailto:yaz133@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yafei-zhang-judie/
---

As a data-driven business and marketing strategist with experience in business development and public relations, I am passionate about transforming data insights into impactful stories that boost companies' revenue and enhance brand visibility. I am eager to use analytics skills like Python, SQL, and machine learning models to improve customer interactions, streamline operational processes, and optimize decision-making.

```{=html}
<div class="gallery-section">
  <p class="gallery-title">Through the Lens</p>
  <div class="photo-gallery">
    <img src="photo /DSC_3047.JPG" alt="Golden sunset silhouette">
    <img src="photo /DSC_3471.JPG" alt="Seagull spreading its wings">
    <img src="photo /DSC_3890.JPG" alt="Pastel sunset over the ocean">
  </div>
  <a href="lens.html" class="gallery-view-all">View Full Gallery &rarr;</a>
</div>
```
